endpoints.mid_gate_correction: the first anchor-in-the-loop attempt failed due to a harness bug (string anchors forced onto a timedelta-input round-trip harness), not a model failure; recorded transparently

property_strategy_taxonomy.invertible_parser_or_formatter: an inverse round-trip f(f_inverse(x)) == x, self-validating and needing no external anchor
property_strategy_taxonomy.pure_transform: a contract property relating out to inp (e.g. reversed == forward reversed; four-digit year == str(year))
property_strategy_taxonomy.soundness_anchor: the visible-test known-correct pair, valid only when it matches the harness input convention

roundtrip_evidence.note: the inverse round-trip needs no external anchor; it validates the parser against its own formatter
roundtrip_evidence.property: parse_duration(duration_string(td)) == td for random timedelta td
